title: Who is LowTierGod? Dale Wilson turns heads with rare court victory amid alleged doxxing dispute
summary_full: LowTierGod, whose real name is Dale Wilson, is trending after reportedly winning a California family court case without a lawyer. Wilson received a three-year restraining order against the mother of his child over alleged harassment and sharing of personal information. The court outcome sparked major discussion across social media, with fans and critics debating the surprising legal victory.
